description:
India Book (IB) II, 11b: List of the honorary titles of the Bundar family of Aden, ca. 1120. Written by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi.

Names and titles in the list: Bundar b. Yefet "prince of the congregations," his uncle Avraham "prince of the congregations," his [uncle's] brother Yishaq "the generous [of the congregations?]" and his son Khalaf "the precious of the congregations."
description_he: ספר הודו II,11ב: רשימת תארי כבוד למשפחת בונדאר מעדן, כ-1120, בכתב חלפון בן מנשה הלוי
